product_summary: The Produce and Test (MTO) agent at Agentic Zero executes make-to-order production operations, encompassing manufacturing, assembly, in-process quality control, and functional testing aligned with customer specifications. As a hybrid agent, it combines automated workflows with human oversight to monitor yield and defect metrics while applying relevant compliance rules across industries. This delivers significant business value by streamlining production processes, reducing errors, and ensuring regulatory adherence, ultimately accelerating time-to-delivery and enhancing product quality for manufacturers.
value_proposition: Automates end-to-end MTO production operations with integrated quality control, compliance enforcement, and record generation to reduce defects and accelerate compliant order fulfillment.
technical_summary: The hybrid architecture integrates execution capabilities such as production routing and in-process testing with real-time monitoring of metrics and compliance modules tailored to standards like GxP, ISO 9001, ATEX, and HACCP. It connects seamlessly with existing manufacturing execution systems (MES) and enterprise resource planning (ERP) platforms to generate completion records automatically. This setup enables scalable deployment across pharma, food, and industrial sectors with built-in adaptability for specific regulatory environments.
integration_guide:
# Integration Guide — mto_produce_test_agent
**Process:** Produce and Test (MTO)
**Version:** 1.0.0

## Prerequisites
- Python 3.10+
- Agentic Zero runtime installed
- API credentials configured in .env

## Installation
```bash
# Copy agent to your project
cp mto_produce_test_agent.py ./agents/
```

## Basic Usage
```python
from agents.mto_produce_test_agent import MtoProduceTestAgentAgent

agent = MtoProduceTestAgentAgent()
result = agent.execute({
    "work_orders": your_work_orders_data,
    "production_routings": your_production_routings_data,
    "quality_plans": your_quality_plans_data,
})
print(result['outputs'])
```

## Supported Systems
- SAP ECC
- SAP S/4HANA
- SAP EWM
- Oracle ERP Cloud
- Oracle JDE

## Tools Required
- ERP_work_order_api
- MES_routing_execution
- test_equipment_interface
- quality_record_system

## Escalation
The agent automatically escalates to human when:
- first_pass_yield < 0.95 or test_pass_rate < 1.0 requiring root cause or rework
- missing calibration or compliance record blocks execution
- customer spec change or equipment downtime
api_endpoints: POST /api/v1/agents/mto_produce_test_agent/execute — Execute the agent with inputs
GET  /api/v1/agents/mto_produce_test_agent/status — Get agent status and metrics
demo_script:
1. Open with executive problem: "Manual MTO cycles cost 40+ hours per batch and create compliance gaps; mto_produce_test_agent automates the full Produce-and-Test workflow."
2. Launch agent live: Enter one MTO order; agent instantly generates compliant production plan, test protocols, and risk matrix in <60 seconds.
3. Demonstrate compliance value: Show real-time audit trail, regulatory mapping (ISO/FDA), and automated sign-off that eliminates 90% of manual documentation.
4. Run end-to-end test: Execute AI-driven test suite; agent flags deviations, produces pass/fail report, and logs immutable evidence for audit readiness.
5. Quantify ROI on screen: Display €699 price against 8.0x multiplier—€5,592 net value per deployment—plus 35 hours saved per cycle.
6. Close with action: "One license pays for itself in the first week; ready for pilot approval today."

compliance_frameworks: GxP batch manufacturing records if pharma

use_cases: Use case 1: Automotive MTO supplier uses the agent to auto-generate compliant work orders and test protocols for custom EV battery trays, cutting order-to-production lead time from 14 days to 6 days and reducing engineering rework by 35%.

Use case 2: Chemical plant deploys the agent for ATEX-compliant batch scheduling and real-time hazard checks on make-to-order solvent blends, lowering compliance audit non-conformances from 8 to 1 per year and avoiding €240k in potential fines.
Use case 3: Food processor applies the agent to HACCP-integrated MTO runs for private-label sauces, reducing batch rejection rate from 4.2% to 0.8% and saving €180k annually in raw-material waste.

Use case 4: Industrial equipment OEM uses the agent to produce ISO 9001-traceable test records for custom hydraulic valves, shortening final-inspection cycle by 42% and increasing on-time delivery from 78% to 96%.

Use case 5: Pharma CMO leverages the agent for GxP electronic batch records in make-to-order clinical-trial drug packaging, cutting manual review hours by 65% and accelerating batch release from 5 days to 36 hours.

pricing.price_rationale: Level L2 process with complexity score 100/100. Regulated sector surcharge 40% applied
